title: December 20
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 20''' is the 354th day (355th in leap years) of the year. There are 11 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1916|1916]] – [[Tom Chantrell]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Kevin Rubio]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Joe Cornish]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 46|''Star Wars Weekly'' 46]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 1]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 6]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[A Wretched Hive (Dawn of Defiance)]]'' released.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' released.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Explorer's Guide]]'' released.
*2011 – ''[[The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural (real-life book)|The Journal of Master Gnost-Dural]]'' released.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Card Game]]'' released.
** – ''[[Star Wars: The Card Game Core Set]]'' released.
*[[2013]] – ''[[The Best Holidays and Celebrations in the Galaxy…and Empire Day, Too]]'' released.
*[[2017]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 15|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 15]] published.
*2017 – [[Poe Dameron 22|''Poe Dameron'' 22]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 39|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 39]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''The Rise of Skywalker'']] released.
*2019 – The [[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker (soundtrack)|soundtrack]] of ''The Rise of Skywalker'' released.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Galactic Guide]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Galactic Explorer's Guide]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 41|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 41]] published.
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 39|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 39]] published.
*2023 – [[Revelations (2023) 1|''Revelations'' (2023) 1]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2023) 2|''The High Republic'' (2023) 2]] published.
<noinclude>
